untranslatable_reason: Cup with Handle pattern requires multi-bar pattern recognition (identification of two widely spaced minor highs at similar levels, handle formation pullback, and breakout confirmation). This cannot be expressed as a single-bar conditional rule using only point-in-time indicator comparisons. The pattern requires historical price structure analysis and relative extrema detection across multiple bars, which is beyond the scope of the allowed operators and indicators.
translation_notes: The allowed indicator set and operators do not support pattern detection algorithms. A proper implementation would require: (1) swing point detection to identify the two cup lips, (2) handle pullback validation, (3) breakout confirmation logic. A simplified proxy using close > prev_high for breakout and close < sma_20 for exit was provided, but this does not capture the full Cup with Handle semantics. Recommend implementing this as a custom pattern detector outside the rule engine. Success rate: 68% bull, Average rise: 34%, Failure rate at 5% target: 9%.
